title: Irregular Chef
description: A compat mod that adds new recipes to Farmer's Delight.
body:
## Overview

The Irregular Chef is an eclectic little add-on for Farmer's Delight. It adds foods that work to integrate food items from a variety of pre-existing mods.

You can check out the [wiki](https://github.com/davidjjung/irregularchef/wiki) if you'd like to see which foods depend on which mods being present. It's a little bit outdated moving to 1.19.2 and onwards though!

---
If you're looking for more content that specifically integrates the Abnormals mods with FD, please check out the Abnormals team's official integration mod, [Abnormals Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/abnormals-delight)! You can also find some other add-ons by looking up "Farmer's Delight" in Modrinth's [searchbar](https://modrinth.com/mods?q=farmer%27s+delight&g=categories:%27forge%27), as they still don't have a way to view required dependents.


---

**Requires [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) 1.19.2-1.2.3+ and [Blueprint](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint).**

Note: this mod is *not* affiliated with vectorwing or the Abnormals team. Any questions regarding this mod should be directed to my [issue tracker](https://github.com/davidjjung/irregularchef/issues), not theirs. Feel free to direct any suggestions (compat or otherwise) towards the tracker as well. Thank you!
